name: Category Hero
description: Context-aware PLP hero that uses the current category by default and supports safe editorial overrides.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Category Hero
attribute_definition_groups.description: Context-aware PLP hero that uses the current category by default and supports safe editorial overrides.

attribute_definitions.name: Image override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional image. When empty, the current category banner image is used.

attribute_definitions.name: Eyebrow override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional short label. When empty, the parent category name is used.

attribute_definitions.name: Title override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional title. When empty, the current category name is used.

attribute_definitions.name: Description override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional supporting copy. When empty, the current category description is used.

attribute_definitions.name: Product count override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional non-negative count. When empty, the live PLP result count is used.

attribute_definitions.name: Expose title as H2
attribute_definitions.description: Keep disabled on the standard PLP, whose product-list heading is the page H1. Enable only when this title belongs in the semantic heading hierarchy.

attribute_definitions.name: Image overlay
attribute_definitions.description: Uses theme-aware overlay presets to preserve text readability.
